name: Easy Cocoa Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 1-quart airtight container or decorative gift jar; cover.
2. For single serving, place rounded 1/4 cup Easy Cocoa Mix in mug or cup.
3. Add 3/4 cup boiling water to the mix and stir until dissolved.
4. Top with sweetened whipped cream and marshmallows, if desired.
5. Serve immediately.
Makes about 4 cups of mix or 16 servings.
